channel.title: +Vijayanagara on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Vijayanagara on Vishvas's notes

item.title: 1 Founder age
item.description: harihara harihara, aka Hakka, founder of vijayanagara empire, karNATaka-vidyA-vilAsa, bhAShegeTTappuva-rAya-gaNDa, brother of bukka. Was associated with hoysaLa court (General ballappa daNDanAyaka, nephew of vIrabaLLALa married his daughter) and possibly kampili kingdom as well. Disciple of the shaiva kriyAshakti. bukka-rAya brother of hakka, who overcame all other south indian kigdoms, including madurai sultAnate, under whom labored mAdhavAchArya’s committee. vidyAraNya mAdhavAchArya, son of Mayana, vidyAraNya shankarAchArya after sannyAsa, who supposedly inspired the founding of vijayanagara (being the kulaguru of one of them - bukka), reinvigorated the arts.

item.title: 2 Middle
item.description: devarAya 2 mightiest of the sangama line, great patron of arts and culture. Sponsored composition of commentary of shArngadeva’s sangItaratnAkara (composed in devagiri 50 years before its fall). Faced with defeats and tributes, began to employ muslims and train hindus in archery. Survived assassination attempts. Quralleled with the bahmani- sultans. Invaded lankA, extracted tributes from pegu and kerala. Explorer Nicolo Conti and Persian chronicler Abdur Razzak arrived in South India and admired vijayanagara.

item.title: ibrAhim Adil shAh 2
item.description: ibrAhim Adil shAh 2, the jagadguru bAdshAH, sarasvatI-bhakta, tAnapurI, ruler of vidyAnagarI.
